sentences.arabic: أَبُو بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقُ هُوَ أَفْضَلُ الصَّحَابَةِ بَعْدَ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr es-Siddik je najbolji ashab nakon vjerovjesnika.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr as-Siddiq is the best of the Companions after the Prophets.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ رَجُلًا كَرِيمًا يُحِبُّ اللهَ وَرَسُولَهُ حُبًّا شَدِيدًا.
sentences.translation: Bio je plemenit čovjek koji je mnogo volio Allaha i Njegovog Poslanika.
sentences.translationEn: He was a generous man who loved Allah and His Messenger dearly.

sentences.arabic: فِي غَزْوَةِ تَبُوكَ، تَصَدَّقَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ بِكُلِّ مَالِهِ لِأَجْلِ الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: U bici na Tebuku, Ebu Bekr je udijelio sav svoj imetak za islam.
sentences.translationEn: In the Battle of Tabuk, Abu Bakr donated all his wealth for the sake of Islam.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ النَّبِيُّ عَمَّا تَرَكَ لِأَهْلِهِ، فَقَالَ: «تَرَكْتُ لَهُمُ اللهَ وَرَسُولَهُ».
sentences.translation: Poslanik ga je upitao šta je ostavio svojoj porodici, a on je odgovorio: „Ostavio sam im Allaha i Njegovog Poslanika“.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet asked him what he had left for his family, and he replied: 'I have left for them Allah and His Messenger.'

sentences.arabic: نَتَعَلَّمُ مِنْ قِصَّتِهِ مَعْنَى التَّضْحِيَةِ وَالتَّوَكُّلِ عَلَى اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Iz njegove priče učimo značenje žrtvovanja i oslonca na Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: We learn from his story the meaning of sacrifice and reliance on Allah.
